title: navarretia leucocephala subsp. pauciflora
intro: Navarretia leucocephala subsp. pauciflora, also known as few-flowered mountain whitetop, is a plant species that belongs to the phlox family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Navarretia leucocephala subsp. pauciflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
